author: saiken
description: Measure the editing time and revision effort behind every note, then resurface the expensive ones you stopped reading. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Effort Index

name: Effort Index

releases.author: israerusan
releases.description:
Measure the editing time and revision effort behind every note, then resurface the expensive ones you stopped reading.

The optional Pro semantic feature uses the Second Read engine — a local, offline sidecar installed in one click and SHA-256-verified. Free features need no engine.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/israerusan/effort-index/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
